result.shareText: I got "{{profile}}" on Love it or Leave it! What's YOUR cinema profile?

movies.nausicaa: Nausicaä of the Valley of the Wind
movies.souviens_toi: I Know What You Did Last Summer
movies.ouest_sauvage: Once Upon a Time in the West

actionHero.title: The Action Hero
actionHero.description: You live for the big screen spectacle. Explosions, car chases, epic showdowns — if it makes the whole theater shake, you're buying a ticket.

comedyLegend.title: The Comedy Legend
comedyLegend.description: Life's too short not to laugh. You can quote entire movies from memory and you believe the best medicine is a perfectly timed punchline.

horrorMaster.title: The Horror Master
horrorMaster.description: While others hide behind their popcorn, you lean in. You find beauty in the dark, and a good scare is your idea of a perfect Friday night.

romanceDreamer.title: The Romance Dreamer
romanceDreamer.description: You believe in movie love — the grand gestures, the rain-soaked kisses, the boombox held high. Your heart is an open cinema.

dramaCritic.title: The Drama Critic
dramaCritic.description: You see past the surface. Character depth, social commentary, breathtaking cinematography — you appreciate cinema as an art form.

animationFan.title: The Animation Fan
animationFan.description: You know that animation isn't just for kids. From hand-drawn masterpieces to cutting-edge CGI, you appreciate the artistry of every frame.

thrillerAddict.title: The Thriller Addict
thrillerAddict.description: You crave the edge-of-your-seat moments. Plot twists, cat-and-mouse games, and unreliable narrators — you want your mind blown.

sciFiPioneer.title: The Sci-Fi Pioneer
sciFiPioneer.description: You're always looking toward the horizon. From distant galaxies to near-future dystopias, you love exploring what 'could be'.

epicAdventurer.title: The Epic Adventurer
epicAdventurer.description: You want it all: grand scale, heroic journeys, and a touch of whimsy. You're the first to volunteer for a quest to save the world.

darkPhilosopher.title: The Dark Philosopher
darkPhilosopher.description: You're drawn to the complex and the macabre. You don't just want to be scared; you want to be challenged by the shadows.

nostalgicSoul.title: The Nostalgic Soul
nostalgicSoul.description: You find comfort in the classics and the colorful. Your ideal movie feels like a warm hug from your childhood.

tensionExpert.title: The Tension Expert
tensionExpert.description: You're a master of the slow burn. You appreciate the mounting dread and the sharp intake of breath before the final reveal.

cosmicExplorer.title: The Cosmic Explorer
cosmicExplorer.description: The universe is your playground. You love the intersection of high-tech gadgets and high-stakes interstellar conflict.

feelGoodGuru.title: The Feel-Good Guru
feelGoodGuru.description: You're here for the vibes. If a movie leaves you with a smile on your face and a song in your heart, it's a winner.

humanistSpirit.title: The Humanist Spirit
humanistSpirit.description: You're moved by the human condition. You value empathy, connection, and the small, quiet moments that define us.

chaosConnoisseur.title: The Chaos Connoisseur
chaosConnoisseur.description: You love a wild ride. High energy, sharp wit, and unpredictable turns keep you coming back for more.

movieBuff.title: The Ultimate Movie Buff
movieBuff.description: You love EVERYTHING. Your heart is a wide-open cinema and you find joy in every single frame. A true lover of the seventh art!

hardToPlease.title: The Hard to Please
hardToPlease.description: You've seen it all, and you're not easily impressed. You have extremely high standards, and only the absolute best makes the cut.

cinemaNewbie.title: The Cinema Newbie
cinemaNewbie.description: A whole world of stories is waiting for you! You're at the very beginning of your cinematic journey, and that's the most exciting place to be.
